schema_design.rationale: Required top-level array, clean item shape, additionalProperties:false, idiomatic state separation.

cli_ergonomics.rationale: Intuitive commands, clear PENDING/DONE prefix. Optional-name heuristic fragile when id matches row name.

enforcement_correctness.rationale: Placement correct (step 1.5). AC #6 NOT satisfied — gate evidence string is NOT augmented with user-action completion count.

cleanup_quality.rationale: Hook file + settings.json cleanup complete. BUT: stale rws gate-check references in commands/work.md, commands/checkpoint.md, references/gate-protocol.md, references/rules-strategy.md, docs/architecture/cli-architecture.md.

agent_instruction_clarity.rationale: Correctly emphasizes user-only completion. Could strengthen with examples of id format and when NOT to use.

concerns: AC #6 unmet: gate evidence not augmented with user-action completion count
Stale rws gate-check references remain in commands/, references/, docs/ — will actively mislead agents
Optional-name heuristic misroutes when action id matches row name
strengths: Schema tight: required fields, kebab pattern, additionalProperties:false
Transition check placement correct: after record_gate, before artifact validation
step-sequence.md updated with new pending-action blocker language
Agent skill correctly asserts user-only completion semantics
